response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is a senior-level engineer with over 15 years of career history, far exceeding the entry-level scope of the role; their focus on niche technologies like DLang and embedded systems diverges from the required stack (TypeScript, React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL); additionally, their German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple roles
Strong full-stack experience with React and REST APIs
Proven track record in open-source and scalable system design
concerns: Overqualified and senior-level, mismatched with entry-level role
Limited demonstrated experience with PostgreSQL or Nest.js
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
